feed.title: James Reynolds’ web presence
feed.subtitle: Traffic and transport engineer, researcher and occasional musician

entry.title: Welcome to this
entry.content:
I need to put together a basic web presence to host some things on github pages. This is it. Welcome.

What I am doing at the moment?

Two-year post-doc position at Atlantic Technological University (ATU) in North West Ireland. Researching car share, shared e-bikes and e-cargobikes (like those pictured above) as part of the ROBUST project.

What I did not long ago

Around ten years with the Public Transport Research Group at Monash University, including as part of the Sustainable and Effective Public Transport Graduate Research Industry Partnership (SEPT-GRIP). This invovled a Phd project on transit priority implementation. The thesis is available here.

Lagrange theme

This uses the Lagrange Jekyll theme from Paul Le. See how to set up your own here.

More to come

I guess.
entry.summary: I need to put together a basic web presence to host some things on github pages. This is it. Welcome.
